The solution was then stirred for another four hours to ensure the completeness of the reaction.

位置索引.原文: First,  $4.806\mathrm{g}$  (24 mmol) ODA was added to a three-neck flask and mixed with  $100~\mathrm{mL}$  DMF under room temperature and a nitrogen atmosphere. A total of  $5.235\mathrm{g}$  (24 mmol) PMDA was gradually added to form a polyamic acid precursor solution with a light yellow color. The solution was then stirred for another four hours to ensure the completeness of the reaction. Next, the viscous polyamic acid solution was diluted with another  $100~\mathrm{mL}$  DMF, and slowly poured into  $600~\mathrm{mL}$  deionized water under vigorous stirring for precipitation. The yellow polyamic acid was dried in a vacuum oven at  $50^{\circ}\mathrm{C}$  for more than two days before use.

反应条件.制备过程: 将聚酰胺酸、TEA和去离子水混合，超声处理至所有物料完全溶解，形成PAAS溶液

反应条件.制备过程: 将CNCs分散在去离子水中，容器中加入七个特氟龙球促进CNC粉末解团聚，1500rpm搅拌分散，形成均匀CNC水凝胶

位置索引.原文: Next,  $700\mathrm{mg}$  of CNCs was dispersed in  $4.444\mathrm{g}$  deionized water by a planetary mixer (MV-300S, CGT, Taiwan) at  $1500\mathrm{rpm}$  for  $10\mathrm{min}$  to form a uniform CNC hydrogel. Seven Teflon balls were added in the container to deagglomerate the CNC powder better.

反应条件.制备过程: 将PAAS水溶液与CNC水凝胶混合，1500rpm搅拌30min，得到聚酰胺酸浓度7.0wt%、CNC浓度6.5wt%的目标复合油墨

位置索引.原文: Finally, the aqueous PAAS solution was mixed with the CNC hydrogel by the planetary mixer at  $1500\mathrm{rpm}$  for  $30\mathrm{min}$ . The final concentration of polyamic acid and CNCs was  $7.0\mathrm{wt\%}$  and  $6.5\mathrm{wt\%}$ , respectively. For comparison, the amount of CNC was adjusted to make inks with  $5.6\mathrm{wt\%}$ ,  $6.5\mathrm{wt\%}$ , and  $7.4\mathrm{wt\%}$  CNCs.

反应条件.反应装置: 改造FDM打印机（INFINITY X1Speed, INFINITY3DP）、注射泵（NE-1010, New Era Instrument）、0.4mm锥形塑料喷嘴（TPND-22G-U, Musashi Engineering）
反应条件.制备过程: 将纯CNC ink转移到10mL一次性注射器中，用行星搅拌机除去油墨中的气泡；将注射器安装在注射泵上并连接喷嘴，打印机由Repetier软件控制，G代码由Slic3r刀路生成器生成；设置打印速度为20 mm/s，挤出速率为0.155 mL/min，挤出后逐层堆叠得到成型湿坯

位置索引.原文: The as-prepared PAAS/CNC ink was transferred into a 10 mL disposable syringe. The bubbles within the ink were removed by the planetary mixer. A FDM printer (INFINITY X1Speed, INFINITY3DP, Kaohsiung, Taiwan) was modified for the DIW process by replacing the extruder with a 3D printed adapter. The syringe was then mounted on a syringe pump (NE-1010, New Era Instrument, Farmingdale, NY, USA) and connected to a 0.4mm conical type plastic nozzle (TPND-22G-U, Musashi Engineering, Tokyo, Japan). The printer was controlled by Repetier software, and the G-codes were generated from the Slic3r toolpath generator. Typically, the printing speed was set at 20 mm / s, and the extrusion rate was 0.155 mL / min.

后处理步骤: 冷冻干燥去除水分，形成大孔结构

However, the color of the pure CNC aerogels became darker, indicating that some CNCs were thermally degraded.

位置索引.原文: Next, 700mg of CNCs was dispersed in 4.444g deionized water by a planetary mixer (MV-300S, CGT, Taiwan) at 1500rpm for 10min to form a uniform CNC hydrogel. Seven Teflon balls were added in the container to deagglomerate the CNC powder better.

反应条件.制备过程: 将PAAS水溶液与CNC水凝胶混合，行星搅拌机搅拌混合，得到目标浓度的复合ink

位置索引.原文: Finally, the aqueous PAAS solution was mixed with the CNC hydrogel by the planetary mixer at 1500rpm for 30min. The final concentration of polyamic acid and CNCs was 7.0wt% and 6.5wt%, respectively.

反应条件.反应装置: modified FDM printer (INFINITY X1Speed, INFINITY3DP) with syringe pump (NE-1010, New Era Instrument) and 0.4mm conical plastic nozzle (TPND-22G-U, Musashi Engineering)
反应条件.制备过程: 将复合ink转移到10mL一次性注射器，行星搅拌机脱除气泡，安装到打印平台，软件控制进行直写成型（DIW）3D打印

位置索引.原文: The as-prepared PAAS/CNC ink was transferred into a 10 mL disposable syringe. The bubbles within the ink were removed by the planetary mixer. A FDM printer (INFINITY X1Speed, INFINITY3DP, Kaohsiung, Taiwan) was modified for the DIW process by replacing the extruder with a 3D printed adapter. The syringe was then mounted on a syringe pump (NE-1010, New Era Instrument, Farmingdale, NY, USA) and connected to a 0.4mm conical type plastic nozzle (TPND-22G-U, Musashi Engineering, Tokyo, Japan). The printer was controlled by Repetier software, and the G-codes were generated from the Slic3r toolpath generator. Typically, the printing speed was set at 20 mm / s, and the extrusion rate was 0.155 mL / min.

工艺流程.产物名称: 冷冻干燥PAAS/CNC复合干燥坯体

反应条件.制备过程: 打印坯体先在-20℃冰箱冷冻过夜，之后转移到冷冻干燥机干燥超过两天，得到干燥的复合坯体

位置索引.原文: The printed objects were frozen in a -20℃ refrigerator overnight. The frozen samples were rapidly transferred to a freeze dryer and dried for more than two days.

原料.原料名称: 冷冻干燥PAAS/CNC复合干燥坯体
原料.原料类型: 聚酰胺酸/CNC复合干燥坯体

反应条件.制备过程: 干燥坯体在真空下进行程序升温热处理，完成热酰亚胺化，得到最终PI/CNC复合气凝胶
反应条件.反应条件: sequential temperature increase from 80, 120, 180, 240, to 300℃ under vacuum, ramping rate 1℃/min, each temperature held for 1 hour

位置索引.原文: The dried samples further underwent a sequential temperature increase from 80, 120, 180, 240, to 300℃ under vacuum to form the PI/CNC composite aerogels. Each temperature was held for one hour, and the ramping rate was 1℃/min in all cases.

反应条件.制备过程: 先将ODA加入三口烧瓶，室温氮气下与DMF混合，逐步加入PMDA形成淡黄色聚酰胺酸前驱体溶液，搅拌4小时保证反应完全，再加入额外100mL DMF稀释，在剧烈搅拌下缓慢倒入600mL去离子水中沉淀

工艺流程.后处理步骤: 在真空烘箱中50℃干燥超过两天

位置索引.原文: First, 4.806g (24 mmol) ODA was added to a three-neck flask and mixed with 100 mL DMF under room temperature and a nitrogen atmosphere. A total of 5.235g (24 mmol) PMDA was gradually added to form a polyamic acid precursor solution with a light yellow color. The solution was then stirred for another four hours to ensure the completeness of the reaction. Next, the viscous polyamic acid solution was diluted with another 100 mL DMF, and slowly poured into 600 mL deionized water under vigorous stirring for precipitation. The yellow polyamic acid was dried in a vacuum oven at 50℃ for more than two days before use.

反应条件.制备过程: 将聚酰胺酸、TEA和去离子水混合在玻璃样品瓶中，超声至所有物料溶解形成PAAS溶液

位置索引.原文: First, 0.750g polyamic acid, 0.363g TEA, and 4.444g deionized water were mixed in a glass vial. The solution was sonicated until all materials had dissolved to form the PAAS solution.

反应条件.反应装置: 行星搅拌机（MV-300S, CGT, Taiwan），容器中添加7个特氟龙球用于解聚
反应条件.制备过程: 将CNCs分散在去离子水中，加入7个特氟龙球促进CNC粉末解聚，行星搅拌机1500rpm搅拌10min形成均匀CNC水凝胶，制备7.4wt% CNC油墨时调整CNC投料量

位置索引.原文: Next, 700mg of CNCs was dispersed in 4.444g deionized water by a planetary mixer (MV-300S, CGT, Taiwan) at 1500rpm for 10min to form a uniform CNC hydrogel. Seven Teflon balls were added in the container to deagglomerate the CNC powder better. For comparison, the amount of CNC was adjusted to make inks with 5.6wt%, 6.5wt%, and 7.4wt% CNCs.

原料.原料类型: 纤维素纳米晶体水凝胶

反应条件.制备过程: 将水性PAAS溶液与CNC水凝胶混合，调整CNC用量使最终油墨中CNC浓度为7.4wt%，聚酰胺酸浓度为7.0wt%，行星搅拌机1500rpm搅拌30min

位置索引.原文: Finally, the aqueous PAAS solution was mixed with the CNC hydrogel by the planetary mixer at 1500rpm for 30min. The final concentration of polyamic acid and CNCs was 7.0wt% and 6.5wt%, respectively. For comparison, the amount of CNC was adjusted to make inks with 5.6wt%, 6.5wt%, and 7.4wt% CNCs.

原料.原料类型: 聚酰胺酸/纤维素纳米晶体复合油墨

反应条件.反应装置: 10mL一次性注射器、改装FDM打印机（INFINITY X1Speed, INFINITY3DP）、注射泵（NE-1010, New Era Instrument）、0.4mm圆锥形塑料 nozzle（TPND-22G-U, Musashi Engineering）
反应条件.制备过程: 将复合油墨转移到10mL一次性注射器中，行星搅拌去除油墨内气泡，FDM打印机更换挤出机为3D打印适配器改装用于DIW工艺，注射器安装到注射泵并连接喷嘴，打印机由Repetier软件控制，Slic3r生成G代码，设置打印速度20mm/s，挤出速率0.155mL/min进行打印，得到成型坯体

位置索引.原文: The as-prepared PAAS/CNC ink was transferred into a 10 mL disposable syringe. The bubbles within the ink were removed by the planetary mixer. A FDM printer (INFINITY X1Speed, INFINITY3DP, Kaohsiung, Taiwan) was modified for the DIW process by replacing the extruder with a 3D printed adapter. The syringe was then mounted on a syringe pump (NE-1010, New Era Instrument, Farmingdale, NY, USA) and connected to a 0.4mm conical type plastic nozzle (TPND-22G-U, Musashi Engineering, Tokyo, Japan). The printer was controlled by Repetier software, and the G-codes were generated from the Slic3r toolpath generator. Typically, the printing speed was set at 20 mm / s, and the extrusion rate was 0.155 mL / min.

工艺流程.产物名称: 冷冻干燥后的PAAS/CNC预成型体

反应条件.制备过程: 将打印后的物体放入-20℃冰箱冷冻过夜，随后快速转移到冷冻干燥机干燥

位置索引.原文: The printed objects were frozen in a -20℃ refrigerator overnight. The frozen samples were rapidly transferred to a freeze dryer and dried for more than two days.

原料.原料名称: 冷冻干燥后的PAAS/CNC预成型体
原料.原料类型: 聚酰胺酸/CNC复合预成型体

反应条件.制备过程: 干燥后的预成型体在真空下进行梯度升温热处理，从80℃、120℃、180℃、240℃逐步升温至300℃，升温速率1℃/min，每个温度保温1小时，完成酰亚胺化得到目标复合气凝胶
反应条件.反应条件: 升温速率1℃/min，每个温度保温1小时，梯度温度：80℃→120℃→180℃→240℃→300℃，真空环境

位置索引.原文: The dried samples further underwent a sequential temperature increase from 80, 120, 180, 240, to 300℃ under vacuum to form the PI/CNC composite aerogels. Each temperature was held for one hour, and the ramping rate was 1℃/min in all cases.

反应条件.制备过程: Amino-capped aniline trimer (ACAT) was prepared by following the procedure reported by Wei et al. The synthesis of ACAT proceeds via oxidative coupling with ammonium persulfate as the oxidant.

位置索引.原文: Amino-capped aniline trimer (ACAT) was prepared by following the procedure reported by Wei et al. Briefly, the synthesis of ACAT involved the use of ammonium persulfate to oxidize 2 equivalents of aniline and 1,4-phenylenediamine. The ACAT was synthesized by the oxidative coupling of 4 - 4′-diaminodiphenylamine and aniline monomer by the addition of ammonium persulfate as the oxidant.

反应条件.制备过程: 溶解BSAA于DMAc中，连续搅拌30min

位置索引.原文: Solution A was prepared by dissolving BSAA (0.52g,1mmol) in 8.0g of DMAc with continuous stirring for 30min at room temperature.

反应条件.制备过程: 溶解ACAT于DMAc中，连续搅拌30min

位置索引.原文: Solution B was prepared by dissolving ACAT (0.29g,2mmol) in 8.0g of DMAc with continuous stirring for 30min at room temperature.

反应条件.制备过程: 溶液B加入溶液A后，机械搅拌24h得到聚酰胺酸溶液

位置索引.原文: After stirring for 30min, solution B was added to solution A, and mechanically stirred for 24h to prepare a poly(amic acid) solution.

反应条件.制备过程: 向聚酰胺酸溶液中加入乙酸酐和吡啶，进行化学酰亚胺化反应，回流3h

位置索引.原文: The poly(amic acid)(PAA) was converted to polyimide(PI) by chemical imidization reaction. This reaction was done by adding acetic anhydride (0.102g,1mmol) and pyridine (0.079g,1mmol) to the solution, and refluxing for 3h under nitrogen. Methanol (250mL) was used to wash the PI and dried at 60℃ under vacuum for 1 day. Finally, the poly(amic acid) underwent chemical imidization by acetic anhydride and pyridine to form the final product, electroactive polyimide.

反应条件.制备过程: 分别将BSAA溶解于8.0g DMAc、ACAT溶解于8.0g DMAc，室温连续搅拌30min分别得到溶液A和溶液B；将溶液B加入溶液A后，机械搅拌24h得到聚酰胺酸溶液

位置索引.原文: Solution A was prepared by dissolving BSAA (0.52g,1mmol) in 8.0g of DMAc with continuous stirring for 30min at room temperature. Solution B was prepared by dissolving ACAT (0.29g,2mmol) in 8.0g of DMAc with continuous stirring for 30min at room temperature. After stirring for 30min, solution B was added to solution A, and mechanically stirred for 24h to prepare a poly(amic acid) solution.

反应条件.制备过程: 向聚酰胺酸溶液中加入乙酸酐和吡啶，进行化学酰亚胺化回流反应

位置索引.原文: The poly(amic acid)(PAA) was converted to polyimide(PI) by chemical imidization reaction. This reaction was done by adding acetic anhydride (0.102g,1mmol) and pyridine (0.079g,1mmol) to the solution, and refluxing for 3h under nitrogen. Methanol (250mL) was used to wash the PI and dried at 60°C under vacuum for 1 day.

反应条件.制备过程: 将电活性聚酰亚胺溶解于DMAc，加入1mM氯金酸水溶液，室温搅拌反应6h

位置索引.原文: The gold nanoparticle-doped electroactive polyimide (PI/AuNPs) samples were prepared by dissolving PI in DMAc, and adding aqueous HAuCl4 solution (1mM) at room temperature, then stirring for 6h. After the reaction, centrifugal filtration was done to collect the precipitate. Large volumes of distilled water were used to wash the residue. The PI/AuNPs were dried in a vacuum oven at 60°C.

原料.型号: 抛光, 直径0.5mm, 长度2.5cm

反应条件.制备过程: 将金丝焊接到抛光铜丝，一对焊接后的金铜丝间隔200μm安装到定制特氟龙块；将金丝在洗涤剂溶液中超声清洗15min，依次用水、丙酮、甲醇、水洗涤后干燥；用氰基丙烯酸酯粘合剂固定使 wires 保持直立；暴露的金端作为基底，先用1200目砂纸抛光，再用氧化铝浆料抛光；抛光后的电极用甲醇洗涤，超纯水超声5min后干燥

位置索引.原文: Substrate preparation. The substrate (Figure 1b) is composed of gold wires (18 karats, ∅ = 0.5mm, l = 0.5cm) soldered to polished copper wires (∅ = 0.5mm, l = 2.5cm). A pair of soldered Au-Cu wires, separated by a 200 μm gap, was mounted into a custom made Teflon bar (10mm × 10mm × 4mm). The wires were cleaned via ultrasonication in detergent solution for 15min. This step was immediately followed with washing of wires using water, acetone, methanol, water, and then dried. The wires were held in a sturdy and upright position by applying a cyanoacrylate adhesive (Mighty Bond™ by Pioneer ® adhesives). The exposed Au ends, which served as the substrate, were subsequently polished with high grade of abrasive paper (1200 grit) and pad with aluminum slurry (∅ = 3 μm). The polished electrodes were then washed with methanol, sonicated in ultrapure water for 5 minutes, and dried.

工艺流程.产物名称: PI/AuNPs基硫化氢气体化学电阻传感器

位置索引.原文: (4) PI/AuNPs-based H2S gas chemiresistor sensor

sample_id: doi:10.3390/polym11121918_conducting polyaniline doped with gold nanoparticles_01

工艺流程.产物名称: conducting polyaniline doped with gold nanoparticles

位置索引.原文: Figure 7a shows a comparison of calibration plots of electroactive PI/AuNPs and PANI/AuNPs chemiresistor sensors towards increasing concentration of hydrogen sulfide gas
